title: Robinhood Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
text: Robinhood reported strong fourth quarter and record full year 2025 results demonstrating continued growth momentum. Q4 2025 Financial Results: Record total net revenues of $1.28 billion, representing 27% year-over-year growth. Diluted EPS was $0.66, compared to $1.01 in Q4 2024 (which included a $0.47 benefit from tax and regulatory items). Revenue Breakdown: Transaction-based revenues increased 15% year-over-year to $776 million, driven by other transaction revenue of $147 million, up over 300%. Net interest revenues increased 39% year-over-year to $411 million, driven by growth in interest-earning assets and securities lending. Other revenues increased 109% year-over-year to $96 million, primarily from Robinhood Gold subscriptions of $50 million, up 56%. Operating Expenses: Increased 38% year-over-year to $633 million, driven by marketing investments and acquisition-related expenses. Customer Metrics: Gold Subscribers increased by 1.5 million, or 58%, year-over-year to 4.2 million. Net Deposits were $15.9 billion, annualized growth rate of 19%. Full Year 2025: Record revenues of $4.5 billion, record diluted EPS of $2.05, and record net deposits of $68 billion.
